# Jonathan Malkin

> Jonathan Malkin helps small-business owners find and fix workflow leaks costing deals, time, and cash, then builds or teaches safe, human-approved AI workflows one practical step at a time.

## About

Jonathan Malkin is an Austin-based AI workflow consultant, implementation partner, and workshop facilitator. After 20+ years in enterprise technology, he helps owners diagnose where AI can save money, builds narrow pilots with human approval gates, and teaches teams to own what they build.

His technical writing draws on Jules, a deeply customized Claude Code system with skills, rules, hooks, memory, and automated workflows that runs his own business. It's proof of the engineering rigor behind his consulting work, not the offer itself.

## Key Topics

- Small-business AI workflow diagnosis: finding lost deals, lost time, and slow cash caused by process gaps
- Safe AI pilots: narrow scope, human approval gates, client ownership of systems and data
- Claude Code: skills, hooks, rules, CLAUDE.md configuration, subagent orchestration
- AI agents: autonomous workflows, model selection, team-based agent architectures
- AI operations: workflow design, automation patterns, and operational systems
- Fractional AI operator services and adjacent hands-on implementation models

- In-person AI workshops in Austin and private team workshops: https://builtwithjon.com/ai-assistant-workshop/
- Use-case library (96 examples, 15 business types): https://builtwithjon.com/use-cases/
